title: T-091 — SCIM Group provisioning (POST/PATCH /Groups, members semantics) (FT-031)
prompt:
# T-091 — SCIM Group provisioning (POST/PATCH /Groups, members semantics) (FT-031)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.x, §8.x
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-031** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (L effort)

## Goal
SCIM Group CRUD with members add/remove semantics + role mapping per tenant policy.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/api/scim/Groups/route.ts: GET list + POST create.
2. apps/web/app/api/scim/Groups/[id]/route.ts: GET single + PATCH (add/remove members) + DELETE.
3. groups.ts maps SCIM group displayName → tenant role per `tenant_idp_config.scim_group_role_map` (JSONB).
4. members add/remove triggers grantRole/revokeRole through the existing audited path.
5. Tests cover: create group, add 2 members, remove 1 member, delete group, missing-id 404.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/scim/Groups/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/scim/Groups/[id]/route.ts [create]
- packages/auth/src/scim/groups.ts [create]
- packages/auth/src/scim/__tests__/groups.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid SCIM bearer + tenant, when POST /Groups runs with displayName, then a row is created and an audit_events row is logged.
2. Given a group exists, when PATCH /Groups/{id} adds two member refs, then grantRole is called twice with the mapped role.
3. Given PATCH /Groups/{id} removes a member, then revokeRole is called once.
4. Given DELETE /Groups/{id}, then the group is removed and all member roles are revoked via the audited path; AND Given an unknown id, when GET /Groups/{id} runs, then 404 returned.
## Test strategy
- RED: write groups.test.ts asserting all five ACs before implementation.
- Mock Supabase admin via vi.fn().
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/auth test groups`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass audit_events on member changes.
- Do not allow PATCH to grant roles outside the tenant role map.
- Do not log the SCIM bearer plaintext.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement SCIM 2.0 Group provisioning endpoints (POST /Groups, PATCH /Groups/{id}, GET /Groups) including members add/remove semantics mapped to system roles.
pipeline_inputs.details:
T-013 shipped /Users but not /Groups. Entra ID + Okta sync groups too. Implement Group CRUD with members[] semantics per SCIM 2.0 RFC 7644 §3.5 (PATCH add/remove operations).

AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
